_meta.legal_basis_main: Decision 1668/QD-TTg (December 27, 2024) — Adjusted Hanoi General Planning to 2045, Vision to 2065
_meta.integration_resolution: Resolution 258/2025/QH15 (December 11, 2025) — Single integrated plan combining Capital Plan + Master Plan
_meta.lead_agency: Hanoi People's Committee + Ministry of Construction

urban_model.concept: Multi-polar, multi-center, multi-layer urban cluster — '동심원형 도시 클러스터'

zone_1_central.name_en: Central Urban Zone — Southern Red River
zone_1_central.function: Political-administrative center, cultural heritage, commercial-service hub
zone_1_central.korean_presence: Multiple Korean retail (Lotte, Hyundai), Korean Embassy district (Tay Ho)

zone_2_northern.function: Northern satellite city — Smart city, financial center, international entertainment, green industries, Noi Bai Airport gateway
key_axes: Nhat Tan – Noi Bai axis (finance + airport corridor)

key_projects.name: BRG-Sumitomo North Hanoi Smart City
key_projects.features: 108-floor financial tower (tallest in Vietnam), smart city infrastructure, Japanese-standard urban model

key_projects.name: Co Loa – Dong Anh Urban Development (1,400ha)
Nhat Tan – Noi Bai Financial Corridor
Noi Bai International Airport T3 Expansion

zone_2_northern.korean_presence: LH Corporation (Korea Land & Housing) — smart city pilot; Korean construction firms in BRG project

zone_3_eastern.name_en: Eastern Urban Zone — Long Bien & Gia Lam
zone_3_eastern.function: Eastern urban expansion — residential + industrial + logistics
key_axes: Red River eastern bank bridges (multiple new crossings)

key_projects.name: Ring Road 4 (Hanoi section)
key_projects.note: Multi-province: Hanoi + Bac Ninh + Hung Yen

key_projects.name: Gia Lam Urban District Development
key_projects.status: Planning after Gia Lam district upgrade to urban district

zone_3_eastern.korean_presence: Samsung (Bac Ninh nearby), Korean industrial park tenants

zone_4_western.name_en: Western Urban Zone → Western City (Science & Technology)
zone_4_western.function: Science, technology, high-quality education, cultural tourism, ecological services — R&D hub
key_axes: West Lake – Ba Vi cultural-scientific axis

Hoa Lac Hi-Tech Park.function: Capital Region innovation hub — R&D, universities, high-tech manufacturing
Hoa Lac Hi-Tech Park.status: Under development; 2026 Tien Xuan Smart Urban Area (600ha) under construction
key_projects: Tien Xuan Smart Urban Area (600ha) — construction 2026
TOD node at Km26 (Lang-Hoa Lac expressway) — 2026
SJ Group Smart Urban Area (western Hoa Lac) — Dec 2025 approved

Son Tay City.upgrade: Son Tay town → Son Tay City (post-2030)
Son Tay City.metro_connection: Urban Rail Line 8 (West Lake – Hoa Lac)

key_projects.name: Hoa Lac Hi-Tech Park Phase 2 Development
SJ Group Smart Urban Area (Hoa Lac)

zone_4_western.korean_presence: POSCO, LG, Korean universities exploring Hoa Lac research partnerships

zone_5_southern.name_en: Southern Urban Zone → Southern City (Logistics Hub)
zone_5_southern.function: Logistics hub, industrial support, public services — Gateway to second airport (Gia Binh/Phu Xuyen)

key_projects.name: Phu Xuyen Airport (Gia Binh Airport) — Second Airport
key_projects.note: Replaces Noi Bai as future capacity for Hanoi long-term

key_projects.name: Southern Logistics Hub (Ring Road 4 southern section)
Quan Son – Huong Son Heritage-Tourism Corridor

zone_5_southern.korean_presence: Korean logistics companies (CJ, Lotte Logistics) potential relocation targets

smart_city_framework.basis: National Smart City Program + Hanoi Smart City Master Plan
smart_city_framework.distinction: 스마트시티 = 기술·플랫폼 레이어 / 도시개발 마스터플랜 = 공간·인프라 레이어

pilot_areas: Dong Anh BRG Smart City (Japanese model)
challenges: Slow smart city rollout (acknowledged in master plan Jan 2026)

HN-URBAN-NORTH.desc: 하노이 북부 신도시 — 동아인·BRG 스마트시티·노이바이 공항
keywords_vi: thành phố thông minh đông anh
đô thị phía bắc hà nội
khu công nghệ cao hòa lạc
đô thị phía đông hà nội
đô thị phía nam hà nội
sân bay thứ hai hà nội
đường sắt đô thị hà nội
